location: [Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — this weapon does not appear in the base game] Gravesite Plain — on a corpse in a Messmer Soldier camp down in a ravine south of the Castle Front Site of Grace, near Ellac Greatbridge

source.name: Corpse in Messmer Soldier camp, ravine near Ellac Greatbridge

tactics: From Castle Front grace, head toward Ellac Greatbridge and look for a path dropping down the cliff south of the bridge
Three Messmer Soldiers guard the camp around the corpse and hit hard as a group; pick them off individually rather than fighting all three at once
Easy to miss since the camp sits off the main road, down in a ravine rather than on the bridge itself
lore: Two crossbows welded into one, engineered to load and fire a spread of bolts simultaneously.

builds.name: Crowd-control status applicator
builds.why: Fires 10 bolts at once in a spread pattern, ideal for tagging groups of enemies with status bolts (poison/bleed) in a single shot
